mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{name}, #{credit}, #{hours}, #{semester}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course
SELECT id, teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE credit = #{credit}
SELECT id, teacher_id, name, credit, hours, semester, create_time, update_time FROM course WHERE semester = #{semester}

SELECT c.id, c.teacher_id, c.name, c.credit, c.hours, c.semester, c.create_time, c.update_time, t.name AS teacherName FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{teacherName}, '%')
AND c.credit = #{credit}
ORDER BY c.id ASC

SELECT c.id AS courseId, c.name AS courseName, c.credit, t.id AS teacherId, t.name AS teacherName, COUNT(sc.id) AS studentCount, ROUND(AVG(sc.score), 2) AS avgScore, MAX(sc.score) AS maxScore, MIN(sc.score) AS minScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sc.id), 2) AS passRate FROM course c LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN score sc ON sc.course_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.credit, t.id, t.name
